name: Okta Privileged Accounts Without MFA
description: Detects privileged okta accounts missing MFA protections.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.login AS account_name FROM okta_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND (COALESCE(u.is_admin, false) = true) AND COALESCE(u.mfa_enrolled, false) = false
remediation: Immediately enforce MFA on privileged identities and suspend privileged actions until compliant.
